response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional depth across the full stack with confirmed TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS experience across multiple production roles. His current work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly addresses the AI agent development requirement, which is rare to find. The candidate demonstrates a strong testing culture both in practice and as a workshop facilitator. Key gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest, or Python exposure in the resume, and React is present but not prominently featured — these are worth probing in an interview but do not disqualify him given his breadth and seniority.
strengths: Hands-on AI agent and MCP framework development at re:cinq directly satisfies the AI agent experience requirement
15+ years of continuous TypeScript/Node.js full-stack delivery across diverse production environments including high-throughput and cloud-native systems
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored D-language test frameworks, delivered testing workshops — strong signal for code quality standards
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the primary backend framework in the role's stack
Kotlin and Python — both listed as required language proficiencies — are absent from the skills section and work history
React appears in only one role (Optilyz) without elaboration on depth or complexity of frontend work, making frontend seniority harder to assess
